description: Motor overload - thermal relay tripped due to sustained over-current on drive motor
Belt slip detected - drive drum RPM diverges from belt speed sensor
Gearbox alarm - output shaft torque reading exceeds configured envelope
Photo eye lost - sensor fails to detect expected product passage
Position sensor dropout - inductive target miss during fast index
Pressure regulation fault - downstream pressure falls below setpoint
Unloader valve fault - solenoid did not actuate within commanded window
Air receiver drain fault - auto drain valve failed to cycle at interval
Oil temperature alarm - lubrication circuit exceeded 90C threshold
Seal integrity fault - shaft seal leak detected via moisture sensor
Cavitation detected - discharge pressure oscillation above configured threshold
Vibration alarm - bearing housing RMS exceeds 7 mm/s
Motor current anomaly - running current deviates >20% from nameplate under steady load
